description: ol-duplicate-binder (issue #440): a `map` comprehension whose destructuring item binder repeats a name (`map [:x :x] in …`) binds the same name twice in one pattern — a duplicate for `map`/`filter`/`reduce` exactly as for `for … in` (issue #72 gave all forms destructuring binders). Before #440 the semantic checker only caught this for `for … in`, so the runtime flagged it but the editor/LSP did not. `params` carry the repeated `name` and `form:"destructuring"`; the span points at the second `:x`. `:pairs` is declared first so no `ol-undefined-var` fires.
